arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC Lattice listener.

created_at.description: The date and time when the listener was created.

default_action.description: The default action that the listener takes for incoming requests.

id.description: The unique identifier for the VPC Lattice listener.

last_updated_at.description: The date and time when the listener was last updated.

port.description: The port on which the listener is listening.

protocol.description: The protocol that the listener uses (e.g., HTTP, HTTPS).

service_arn.description: The ARN of the service associated with the listener.

service_id.description: The identifier of the service associated with the listener.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the listener.
